Class DefaultImmutableMap<S,T>

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.util.collection.DefaultImmutableMap<S,T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Iterable<ImmutableMapEntry<S,T>>, ImmutableMap<S,T>
public final class DefaultImmutableMap<S,T> extends Object implements ImmutableMap<S,T>
This class implements ImmutableMap<S,T> and provides a persistent map. It is a simple implementation like lists

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    containsKey(S key)
    Returns true if this map contains a mapping for the specified key.
    boolean
    containsValue(T value)
    Returns true if this map maps one or more keys to the specified value.
    boolean
    equals(@Nullable Object o)
    The equality checks if the argument is another immutable map with the same entries.
    @Nullable T
    get(S key)
    Retrieves the value mapped to key in this map.
    int
    hashCode()
     
    boolean
    isEmpty()
    returns true if the map is empty
    Iterator<ImmutableMapEntry<S,T>>
    iterator()
    Returns an iterator over the entries in this map.
    Iterator<S>
    keyIterator()
    Returns an iterator over the keys in this map.
    static <S,T> DefaultImmutableMap<S,T>
    nilMap()
     
    ImmutableMap<S,T>
    put(S key, T value)
    inserts mapping <key,val> into the map (old map is not modified) if key exists old entry has to be removed null is not allowed for key or value.
    DefaultImmutableMap<S,T>
    remove(S key)
    removes mapping (key,...) from map
    ImmutableMap<S,T>
    removeAll(T value)
    removes all mappings (...,value) from map
    int
    size()
    Returns the number of entries in this map.
    String
    toString()
     
    Iterator<T>
    valueIterator()
    Returns an iterator over the values in this map.

  • Method Details

    • nilMap

      public static <S,T> DefaultImmutableMap<S,T> nilMap()

    • put

      public ImmutableMap<S,T> put(S key, T value)
      inserts mapping <key,val> into the map (old map is not modified) if key exists old entry has to be removed null is not allowed for key or value.
      Specified by:
      put in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
      Parameters:
      key - a S to be used as key
      value - a T to be stored as value
      Returns:
      a ImmutableMap including the <key, value>-pair and all other pairs of the current map with keys different from the given key

    • get

      public @Nullable T get(S key)
      Retrieves the value mapped to key in this map.
      Specified by:
      get in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
      Parameters:
      key - key to look up
      Returns:
      value of type T that is mapped by key of type S, null if key is not in the map

    • size

      public int size()
      Description copied from interface: ImmutableMap
      Returns the number of entries in this map.
      Specified by:
      size in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
      Returns:
      number of entries as int

    • isEmpty

      @EnsuresNonNullIf(result=false, expression={"entry","parent"}) public boolean isEmpty()
      returns true if the map is empty
      Specified by:
      isEmpty in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
      Returns:
      true if this map contains no entries

    • containsKey

      public boolean containsKey(S key)
      Description copied from interface: ImmutableMap
      Returns true if this map contains a mapping for the specified key.
      Specified by:
      containsKey in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
      Parameters:
      key - the key whose presence in this map is to be tested
      Returns:
      true iff the map includes key

    • containsValue

      public boolean containsValue(T value)
      Description copied from interface: ImmutableMap
      Returns true if this map maps one or more keys to the specified value. Comparison is modulo Object.equals(Object).
      Specified by:
      containsValue in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
      Parameters:
      value - the value whose presence in this map is to be tested
      Returns:
      true iff the map includes value

    • remove

      public DefaultImmutableMap<S,T> remove(S key)
      removes mapping (key,...) from map
      Specified by:
      remove in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
      Parameters:
      key - the key whose mapping is to be removed from the map
      Returns:
      the new map (the same if key is not in the map)

    • removeAll

      public ImmutableMap<S,T> removeAll(T value)
      removes all mappings (...,value) from map
      Specified by:
      removeAll in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
      Parameters:
      value - the value whose mappings are to be removed from the map
      Returns:
      the new map (the same if value is not mapped)

    • keyIterator

      public Iterator<S> keyIterator()
      Description copied from interface: ImmutableMap
      Returns an iterator over the keys in this map. The order is most recent first.
      Specified by:
      keyIterator in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
      Returns:
      iterator for all keys

    • valueIterator

      public Iterator<T> valueIterator()
      Description copied from interface: ImmutableMap
      Returns an iterator over the values in this map. If a value is contained multiple times, it will be returned multiple times. The order is most recent first.
      Specified by:
      valueIterator in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
      Returns:
      iterator for all values

    • iterator

      public Iterator<ImmutableMapEntry<S,T>> iterator()
      Description copied from interface: ImmutableMap
      Returns an iterator over the entries in this map. The order is most recent first.
      Specified by:
      iterator in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
      Specified by:
      iterator in interface Iterable<S>
      Returns:
      iterator for entries

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • equals

      public boolean equals(@Nullable Object o)
      The equality checks if the argument is another immutable map with the same entries.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Returns:
      true iff the other object is an immutable map with the same entries
